title: Unified LLM Provider Routing System
essence: Centralized provider configuration with consistent normalization and error handling
steps: Centralize all provider configurations in PROVIDER_ENDPOINTS
Use unified API key retrieval pattern
Standardize error handling per provider type
Add provider validation before API calls
tradeoffs: Single point of failure for provider logic
rollback: Handle each provider independently in calling code

evidence.notes: Stable in production - enables easy provider switching and consistent behavior
